## Description

A clear and concise description of what this PR does and why.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring / code cleanup

## Component

- [ ] Backend (Rust)
- [ ] Frontend (Flutter)
- [ ] Protobuf API
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / Build

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the conventions in the relevant `AGENTS.md`
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] New and existing tests pass locally
- [ ] I have updated documentation if necessary
- [ ] No new compiler warnings or lint errors introduced

## Testing

Describe how you tested your changes. Include relevant details such as test cases, manual steps, or screenshots.

## Additional Notes

Any additional context, concerns, or follow-up work.
